channel.title: Review on Leedle
channel.description: Recent content in Review on Leedle

item.title: All-Rounder Meguru
item.description: You may not know this about me, but I’m kind of a weeb. Its pretty shameful actually, especially since I look down on weebs, but my stuggles my weebery is not the the point of this post. Since I started reading manga I read a great number from a variety of genres, from shonen to shōjo, senin to horror. Like everyone I slowly compiled a list of manga that I liked.
